name: Tanvi Kulkarni
trait: Diva. Will not touch soap, serum, masala, or anything sold in a sachet. FMCG briefs give her a migraine she will describe in detail.

name: Ronak Shah
trait: Fast like a Mumbai local, sloppy like a Mumbai local. Anything needing frame-perfect detail comes back with one frame missing.

name: Meher Bhandari
trait: Hears 'less blue' and adds more blue. Every time. Colour feedback enters her ears and evaporates.

name: Joseph D'Costa
trait: Did 41 Diwali edits last year. One more diya, one more dhol drop, one more rangoli transition and he walks into the sea.

name: Ankit Jha
trait: Junior, eager, cheap. Thinks drop shadow is a luxury finish. Premium briefs come back looking like a tuition flyer.

name: Farah Khambatta
trait: Writes gold. Has no concept of clocks. A 1-day deadline is, to her, a fun rumour.

name: Suresh Nair
trait: 20 years of experience, zero years of memes. Once asked if 'skibidi' was a client. Gen-Z briefs age 40 years in his hands.

name: Dia Malhotra
trait: First version is final version. Revision rounds give her hives. Briefs promising 'multiple finals' end in cold war.
